title: Rabbah #7237
definition:
Rabbath = "great"

 1) the capital city of the Ammonites located east of the Jordan
 2) a town in Judah; site uncertain
nasbUsage:
Definition: Rabbath = "great"

 1) the capital city of the Ammonites located east of the Jordan
 2) a town in Judah; site uncertain

    NASB:  two places in Isr.
